#US VP JD #Vance said he planned to attend the June 19 signing ceremony of Iran's deal in #Switzerland June 19, affirming it was important opportunity to restore regional stability, support global economy. Vance, on first reaction to Fox News on US-Iran deal, also said it was also possible President Donald Trump be there personally. The deal, he added, reopened Strait of Hormuz in exchange of removal of US blockade on Iranian ports, and Tehran would not own or purchase nuclear weapons. #Kuna

Iranian Deputy Foreign Minister Kazem Gharibabadi said immediate, permanent end of "war & military operations" on multiple fronts including #Lebanon would be end tonight. Speaking to Iranian TV, he said obligations by Iran and other commitments would begin after the MoU signed June 19. "Negotiations lasted 15 hours by #Pakistan, @Qatari mediation & we have reached a text of the MoU," he said. #Kuna

#US President Donald Trump said the deal with Iran would bring "peace and security" to the whole region. "With the opening of the Strait upon the signing of the Deal on Friday, for purposes of mine removal, oil will flow on both ends again for the region, and the world," he said on Truth Social. #Kuna
Anger among Iranian hardliners at terms of deal agreed with US

#Pakistan PM Shehbaz #Sharif, while announcing US-Iran deal, thanked mediation efforts by "our brothers," including #Qatar for "their support in reaching this agreement." Sharif also thanked the "visionary leadership" of #SaudiArabia & #Turkiye for their immediate contributions. "Mediators will facilitate a series of meetings this week. These pre-implementation discussions will lay the foundation for the technical talks and official signing ceremony," said Sharif. #Kuna

#US President Donald Trump announced a deal with Iran "is now complete." Trump, on his Truth Social account, said he would fully authorize "toll free opening of the Strait or Hormuz," as well as authorize "immediate remove of the United States Naval blockade." #Kuna

#Pakistan PM Shehbaz Sharif announced Sunday peace deal between #US & Iran "has been REACHED," and the signing ceremony would be held on June 19 in Switzerland. "Both sides have declared the immediate and permanent termination of military operations on all fronts, including in Lebanon," Sharif said on X. #Kuna

Following Mansoor bin Mohammed’s call to support the campaign, Dubai Health announces strong participation from donors and entities in the ‘My Blood, for My Country’ campaign.

Hamdan bin Mohammed directs the launch of the second edition of Dubai Mallathon, the world’s first community sports initiative of its kind, which will run from 15 June to 15 September 2026 across six major shopping malls in Dubai.

Following Mansoor bin Mohammed’s call to support blood donation, and coinciding with World Blood Donor Day, Dubai Health announces that the ‘My Blood, for My Country’ campaign has attracted strong participation from donors and participating entities, recording 43,263 donors from 145 nationalities over the past six months, with first-time donors accounting for 39.5% of the total. The ‘My Blood, for My Country’ campaign is organised in partnership with Al Ameen Service, Dubai Health Authority, Dubai Health, and Emarat Al Youm newspaper.

Hamdan bin Mohammed: Today, we directed the launch of the second edition of the Dubai Mallathon, the first initiative of its kind globally to transform Dubai’s shopping malls into vibrant sports and community destinations throughout the summer. From 15 June to 15 September 2026, malls across Dubai will open daily for walking, running, and a range of sports activities. Open to all, the initiative aims to encourage a healthier, more active lifestyle by making fitness accessible and enjoyable for everyone. We invite residents and visitors alike to join the Dubai Mallathon and take part in its diverse programmes and activities. Together, we can make movement a daily habit and wellbeing a shared

What do we know about details of anticipated Iran-US MoU? A source close to Iran's negotiating team has released new details of the draft MoU, including the release of $24 billion in frozen funds during a 60-day final negotiation period.

استقبل سعادة علي عبدالله الأحمد، الوكيل المساعد للسياسات والاتصال الدفاعي، اللواء توبي لامبرت المستشار العسكري البريطاني لدى مديرية التسليح الوطني البريطانية، وذلك في إطار تعزيز علاقات التعاون الثنائية بين البلدين. وجرى خلال اللقاء بحث عدد من الموضوعات ذات الاهتمام المشترك، وتبادل وجهات النظر حول سبل تطوير التعاون والتنسيق بما يخدم المصالح المشتركة، ويعزز أواصر العلاقات بين الجانبين. حقق فريق المشاة بعصا قياس الخطوات المركز الثالث في المنافسات العسكرية الدولية لعام 2026، التي أُقيمت في أكاديمية ساندهيرست الملكية بالمملكة المتحدة، بمشاركة عدد من الفرق العسكرية الدولية. وتُعد هذه المشاركة الأولى للفريق على المستوى الدولي، حيث نجح في تحقيق إنجاز لافت بحصوله على المركز الثالث، ما يعكس مستوى الكفاءة والجاهزية والاحترافية التي يتمتع بها منتسبوه. ويأتي هذا الإنجاز ثمرةً للتدريب المتواصل والانضباط العسكري والالتزام بأعلى معايير الأداء، بما يجسد القدرات المتميزة للقوات المسلحة في مختلف المحافل الدولية.
